verses.text: Hih hun khit ciangin Absalom in leeng khat leh sakolte, leh ama mai-ah a tai ding mi sawmnga la hi

Absalom tho baihin kulhkongpi lam gei-ah tu zel hi. Mi khatpeuh in thu khensak dingin kumpipa' mai-ah paina ding thu a neih ciangin Absalom in amah samin, “Koi khua pan na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasempa, Israel-te sungah tua minam tua khua ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin
Absalom in ama kiangah, “Thei in, na thugente hoihin man hi; ahih hangin na thu a khen dingin kumpipa in a koih mi omlo hi,” a ci hi

Tua thamloin Absalom in, “Gamsungah kei thukhen hi leng! Thu ahi a, a hang khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a nei mi peuhmah kei kiangah hong pai ding a, keimah in ama tungah thu a tangin ka khen ding hi,” a ci hi
Ama tungah zahtakna a bawl dingin mi khatpeuh a nai-ah hong pai ciangin amah in a khut zan a, amah lenin a nam hi
Tua bangin Absalom in kumpipa kiangah thu a khensak dingin a hong pai Israel-te khempeuh tungah a hih hi. Tua ahih ciangin Absalom in Israel mite' lungsim na zo hi
Kum li a cin' ciangin Absalom in kumpipa kiangah, “Kei hong paisak in la, Topa' tungah ka ciamsa ka thuciam, Hebron-ah hong piasak in, ci-in kong thum hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Aram gam Geshur-ah ka om laitakin na nasempa in thu khat ciam a, ‘ Topa in Jerusalem-ah kei hong paipih kik taktak leh Topa' tungah biakna ka pia ding hi,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi
Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Nuamtakin pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin Hebron-ah a pai hi
Ahih hangin Absalom in Israel minam khempeuh kiangah a simthamin kamtaite sawl a, “Peengkul aw na zak phetun, ‘Absalom, Hebron-ah kumpi hi!’ ci un,” a ci hi
A kisam mi za nihte Jerusalem panin Absalom tawh a pai uh hi. Amaute lungsim hoih tawh a pai hi a, bangmah theilo uh hi
Absalom in biakna a piak laitakin David' thulamlakpa, Giloh mi Ahithofel, ama khuapi Gilo panin samsak hi. Tua ciangin sawmsimna hong hat semsem a, Absalom tawh a om mite kibehlaplap hi.
Tua ciangin kamtai khat David kiangah hong pai-in, “Israel mite' lungsim Absalom' lamah pai khin hi,” ci-in a gen hi

Tua ciangin David in Jerusalem-ah amah tawh a om a nasemte khempeuh kiangah, “Ding un, tai ni; tua hi kei leh Absalom' kiang panin eite' suahtakna ding omlo ding hi. Manlangin pai ni; tua hi kei leh amah in eite hong pha pak ding a, eite' tungah siatna hong tungsakin namsau tawh khuapi hong vat ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa' nasemte in ama kiangah, “En in, ka to kumpipa in na khensat peuhpeuh a sem dingin na nasemte kiging hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa paikhia a, ama innkuan leh a ulian khempeuh in ama nung a zui uh hi. Kumpipa in inn kem dingin a zineu sawm nusia hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa paikhia a, mi khempeuh in ama nung a zui uh hi. Tua ciangin khuanawl inn tawpna-ah amaute khawl uh hi
Tua ciangin a nasemte khempeuh in amah nawkin pai uh hi. Khereth mi khempeuh, Peleth mi khempeuh, leh Gath panin amah a zui mi za gukte khempeuh, kumpipa' mai nawkin paisuak uh hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in Gath mi Ittai kiangah, “Bang hangin nang zong kote hong zui na hi hiam? Ciahkik in la, kumpipa tawh om in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen gamdang mi na hi a, na inn panin gamdangah a om zong na hi hi

Nang pen zan mah beka hong pai na hi hi. Koi lai munah kei pai ding cih theilopi-in kote tawh a kawivak dingin nang hong bawl ding ka hi hiam? Ciahkik in, na sanggamte ciahpih in. Topa in itna kip leh thumanna nang' tungah hong lak ta hen,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Ittai in kumpipa dawngin, “ Topa nungta-in, ka to kumpipa zong nungta ahih mah bangin, sihna ding ahi a, hin'na ding ahi zongin ka to kumpipa a omna peuhpeuhah na nasempa om ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in Ittai kiangah, “Tua ahih leh pai in, paisuak in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Gath mi Ittai, a mi khempeuh leh amah tawh a om a naupang khempeuh tawh a paisuak hi
Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh a pai laitakin gamsung mi khempeuh a gingin kapkhia uh a, kumpipa in Kidron lui kantanin, mi khempeuh zong gamlak lamah a paisuak uh hi

Tua ciangin Abiathar hong paito a, Zadok zong Levi mi khempeuh tawh hong pai-in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang hong pua uh hi. Mi khempeuh in khuapi a khen' khit mateng amaute in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang nga phot uh hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in Zadok kiangah, “Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang khuapi sungah puakik in. Topa' maipha ka muh nak leh, amah in kei hong paipih kikin Thuciamna Singkuang leh a omna mun hong musak kik ding hi
Ahih hangin amah in, ‘Na tungah lungkimna ka nei kei hi,’ hong cih leh, en in, hih lai-ah kei ka om hi; amah in hoih a sak bangin kei tungah hong bawl hen,” a ci hi
Kumpipa in siampi Zadok kiangah, “En in, nuamtakin nang leh Abiathar, na tapa nihte Ahimaaz leh Abiathar' tapa Jonathan tawh khuapi sungah ciahkik un
Thei in, kei kiangah thu a hong zasak dingin nang' kiang panin thuko mi hong tun' mateng gamlak tui ngahmunte-ah ka na ngak ding hi,” cithuah lai hi
Tua ahih ciangin Zadok leh Abiathar in Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang Jerusalem-ah puakik uh a, amaute tua lai-ah om uh hi
Ahih hangin Oliv Mual tung kahtohna-ah David paito a, khe guak leh lu tuamsa-in a paikawmin kap hi. Amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zong lu khuhsa-in a paitoh kawmun a kap uh hi

Tua laitakin David kiangah, “Ahithofel zong mi sawmsimte lakah Absalom tawh om hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in, “ Topa aw, kong thum hi; Ahithofel' thugente haina-in na heisak in,” a ci hi
Pasian a kibiakna mun mual dawnah David a tun' ciangin, Arkhi mi Hushai amah a dawn dingin a puantungsilh balkeksa leh a lu tungah lei baang tawh hong pai hi
David in ama kiangah, “Nang hong zuisuak lecin kei-a' dingin vangik na hi ding hi

Ahih hangin khuapi sungah nang ciahkikin Absalom kiangah, ‘Aw kumpipa, kei, nangma nasem ka hi ding hi. Hun beisa sungah na pa' nasem ka hih mah bangin tu-in nangma nasem ka hi ding hi,’ ci lecin, Ahithofel' thugente kei-a' dingin na zo ding hi
Siampi Zadok leh Abiathar tua lai-ah nang tawh om hilo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa' inn pan na zak peuhpeuh siampi Zadok leh Abiathar' kiangah gen in
En in, amau' tapate gel, Zadok' tapa Ahimaaz leh Abiathar' tapa Jonathan, amaute tawh omkhawm hi. Na zak peuhpeuh amaute' tung tawnin kei tungah nong puak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem-ah Absalom a lut laitakin David' lawmpa Hushai zong khuapi sungah a pai hi.
